view.title: Validate explicit UC need #7
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for centralized reporting.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 7 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for centralized reporting.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for centralized reporting.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Centralized reporting', but the evidence provided does not include specific API reads or persisted state checks that directly confirm or deny this requirement. While the linked use case mentions the need for corporate visibility across all locations, there are no concrete details or evidence from API responses that demonstrate the actual implementation of centralized reporting. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of sufficient evidence.
